Typically I enjoy Jason Stephan films but they've all become woke garbage in the last few years. Not sure why he puts up with it.

The story is simple, over exaggerated and nothing interesting. Goes into attack white people as evil and racists which concerns me.

The ending seems like there could be a potential sequel but I definitely won't be going to the cinema this time.

I will say, the VFX of explosions and fire were pretty good compared to other films but other than that, I don’t recommend it. 

If you’re easy going and don’t mind liberal attacks and like over exaggerated films with nothing new, you’ll enjoy it.
